def test_script_runs_successfully():
        # Remove output file if it exists to ensure a fresh run
        if os.path.exists(OUTPUT_FILE):
            os.remove(OUTPUT_FILE)
    
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["node", "send_message.js"],
            cwd=APP_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True
        )
